title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits
description: A parser stores one value per name, splits every comma, accepts obsolete folding, merges Set-Cookie, and treats all field values as trusted UTF-8 text. Learners cumulatively produce loss-aware bounded field-section model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Parse case-insensitive token field names, colon delimiters, optional field whitespace, and field values while rejecting whitespace before the colon.
Preserve field-line order and repeated values, combining only when that field definition permits it.
Parse Connection options and nominate hop-by-hop fields dynamically instead of relying only on a fixed list.
